title: MCP Chat
description: AI-powered chat assistant for OpenMetadata. Connects to an LLM provider and uses MCP tools to search, explore, and manage metadata through natural language.

llmModel.title: Model
llmModel.description: The model to use. For example: gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini.

llmApiEndpoint.title: API Endpoint (Optional)
llmApiEndpoint.description: Custom API endpoint URL. Leave empty to use the default OpenAI endpoint.

systemPrompt.title: System Prompt
systemPrompt.description: The system prompt that guides the assistant's behavior.
systemPrompt.default: You are a helpful metadata assistant for OpenMetadata. Use the available tools to search, explore, and manage metadata. Be concise and actionable.

awsConfig.title: AWS Credentials
awsConfig.description: AWS credentials for accessing Anthropic models via AWS Bedrock.

enabled.title: Enable IAM Auth
enabled.description: Enable AWS IAM authentication. When enabled, uses the default credential provider chain (environment variables, instance profile, etc.).

region.title: AWS Region
region.description: AWS Region where Bedrock is enabled (e.g., us-east-1).

accessKeyId.title: AWS Access Key ID
accessKeyId.description: AWS Access Key ID. Falls back to default credential provider chain if not set.

secretAccessKey.title: AWS Secret Access Key
secretAccessKey.description: AWS Secret Access Key. Falls back to default credential provider chain if not set.

sessionToken.title: AWS Session Token
sessionToken.description: AWS Session Token for temporary credentials.

assumeRoleArn.title: Role ARN for Assume Role
assumeRoleArn.description: ARN of IAM role to assume for cross-account access.

endpointUrl.title: Endpoint URL
endpointUrl.description: Custom endpoint URL for AWS-compatible services.

llmModel.title: Model
llmModel.description: The Bedrock model ID. For example: anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-20250514-v1:0.

systemPrompt.title: System Prompt
systemPrompt.description: The system prompt that guides the assistant's behavior.
systemPrompt.default: You are a helpful metadata assistant for OpenMetadata. Use the available tools to search, explore, and manage metadata. Be concise and actionable.
